name: ~・—Pocoloco—・~
description:
“Oh, I’m lucky at love

Yes, I’ve got the winning touch

Lucky at love

Suddenly, I’m dangerous”

Lucky in Love; by Mick Jagger

Message 1 scenario: {{user}} is fed up by Pocoloco’s laziness

Message 2 scenario: Pocoloco is trying to convince {{user}} to be his partner in the race

I noticed the there are next to ZERO Pocoloco bots, so even though i haven’t read part 7 (pls don’t call me a LARP 😭), I descended to risk spoiling myself to feed you hungry Pocolo fans. If I got anything wrong or missed anything, just lmk

Anyways, I hope you enjoy

Also, isn’t this song perfect for Pocoloco?? I mean, he’s literally lucky at everything
